Designed for professional research operations

Clear structure, measurable outputs, and role-specific workflows.

Centralized Review

Run a complete quality check and consolidate outcomes into one consistent report.

Institution Standards

Define and manage custom submission formats for departments and guided cohorts.

Actionable Output

Generate clear diagnostics and downloadable annotated files for rapid revision cycles.

Two focused dashboards built for different responsibilities.

Coverage categories

Quality checks available in the current platform build.

Metadata

Metadata Completeness

Structure

Abstract Section ExistsAbstract Word Count (150–250 words)Index Terms / KeywordsReferences Section ExistsRoman Numeral Section HeadingsIntroduction Section (I. INTRODUCTION)

Numbering

Figure Label Format (Fig. N / Figure N)Table Label Format (TABLE I)Equation Numbering (1), (2), ...Sequential Figure NumberingSequential Table NumberingSequential Reference Numbering [1],[2],[3]

Formatting

Caption Placement (Fig below / Table above)

References

Reference Format [n] Author, Title, ...URL & DOI Validity

Writing

Repeated Wordset al. FormattingFirst-Person Pronouns (I, we, our)

PaperInsight

Professional manuscript quality infrastructure for academic institutions.
